title: Oracle APEX Application
description: Schema for an Oracle Application Express (APEX) application definition including its pages, regions, items, buttons, processes, computations, and shared components. Based on the APEX application model as documented in the Oracle APEX Application Builder and Blueprint specification.

application_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the APEX application within the workspace

application_name.description: Display name of the APEX application

application_group.description: Logical group to which the application belongs for organizational purposes

workspace.description: Name of the APEX workspace that owns this application

workspace_id.description: Numeric identifier of the APEX workspace

schema.description: Database schema (parsing schema) used by the application for SQL and PL/SQL execution

alias.description: Short alphanumeric alias for the application, used in friendly URLs

application_status.description: Current availability status of the application

build_status.description: Controls whether the application can be modified in the Application Builder

date_format.description: Default Oracle date format mask for the application

timestamp_format.description: Default Oracle timestamp format mask for the application

timestamp_tz_format.description: Default Oracle timestamp with time zone format mask

language.description: Primary language of the application (IANA language tag)

compatibility_mode.description: APEX version compatibility mode for the application

authorization_scheme.description: Name of the authorization scheme controlling access to the entire application

pages.description: Collection of pages that comprise the application

rest_data_sources.description: REST data source definitions for external API integration

web_credentials.description: Web credential stores for authenticating REST data source requests

created_on.description: Timestamp when the application was created

last_updated_on.description: Timestamp when the application was last modified

last_updated_by.description: Username of the developer who last modified the application

AuthenticationScheme.description: Authentication scheme defining how users are verified when accessing the application

invalid_session_type.description: Action taken when a session is invalid

logout_url.description: URL to redirect to after logout

session_not_valid_url.description: URL to redirect to for invalid sessions

is_current.description: Whether this is the currently active authentication scheme

SessionManagement.description: Session configuration parameters for the application

max_session_idle_sec.description: Maximum idle time before session expiration in seconds

session_state_protection.description: Level of session state protection against URL tampering

rejoin_existing_sessions.description: Whether existing sessions can be rejoined

navigation_list.description: Name of the shared component list used for navigation

breadcrumb.description: Name of the breadcrumb used for hierarchical navigation

UserInterface.description: User interface settings for the application

theme_number.description: Numeric identifier of the UI theme

theme_name.description: Display name of the UI theme

template_set.description: Template options or style set applied to the theme

global_page_id.description: Page ID of the global page (Page 0) that is rendered with every other page

login_page_id.description: Page ID of the login page

home_page_id.description: Page ID of the application home page

error_page_id.description: Page ID of the error handling page

Page.description: An application page containing regions, items, buttons, processes, and dynamic actions

page_id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the page within the application

page_alias.description: Alphanumeric alias for the page used in friendly URLs

page_group.description: Group to which the page belongs for organizational purposes

page_template.description: Name of the page template used for rendering

authorization_scheme.description: Authorization scheme controlling access to this page

page_requires_authentication.description: Whether the page requires an authenticated session

deep_linking.description: Whether deep linking (direct URL access) is allowed

items.description: Page-level items (form fields, display items, hidden items)

processes.description: Server-side processes that execute on page submit or load

computations.description: Server-side computations that set item values

validations.description: Server-side validations that run on page submit

dynamic_actions.description: Client-side dynamic actions triggered by browser events

branches.description: Page branching rules for navigation after page processing

Region.description: A region is a container on a page that displays content such as reports, forms, charts, or static HTML

region_id.description: Unique numeric identifier of the region

region_type.description: Type of region determining its rendering behavior

template.description: Name of the region template used for rendering

display_position.description: Page template position where the region is rendered

source_type.description: Type of data source for the region
enum: PL/SQL Function Body returning SQL Query

source.description: Source code, table name, or query used by the region

authorization_scheme.description: Authorization scheme controlling visibility of this region

condition_type.description: Condition type that determines when the region is rendered

sub_regions.description: Nested sub-regions contained within this region

columns.description: Column definitions for report and grid regions

RegionColumn.description: Column definition within a report or interactive grid region

is_visible.description: Whether the column is visible in the region display

format_mask.description: Oracle format mask applied to column values for display

display_sequence.description: Order in which the column appears

PageItem.description: A page item representing a form field, display element, or hidden value on a page

item_name.description: Unique name of the item within the application (convention: P{page_id}_{name})

item_type.description: Type of the page item determining its rendering and behavior

region_id.description: ID of the region containing this item

source_type.description: Source of the item default value

source.description: Database column, expression, or value providing the item's data

is_required.description: Whether the item requires a value

is_primary_key.description: Whether the item represents a primary key column

default_value.description: Default value for the item when no session state value exists

lov_query.description: SQL query for list of values (select lists, popup LOVs, radio groups)

display_sequence.description: Order in which the item appears within its region

authorization_scheme.description: Authorization scheme controlling visibility of this item

Button.description: A button on a page that triggers navigation or page submission

button_action.description: Action performed when the button is clicked

button_position.description: Position of the button within its region or page template

is_hot.description: Whether the button uses hot (primary/accent) styling

region_id.description: ID of the region containing this button

condition_type.description: Condition type that determines when the button is displayed

Process.description: A server-side process that executes PL/SQL, DML, or other operations during page rendering or submission

process_point.description: When in the page lifecycle the process executes

source.description: PL/SQL code block or SQL statement executed by the process

error_message.description: Error message displayed if the process fails

success_message.description: Success message displayed after process completion

when_button_pressed.description: Name of the button that triggers this process

condition_type.description: Condition type determining when the process executes

Computation.description: A server-side computation that sets an item value during page rendering or processing

item_name.description: Name of the item whose value is set by the computation

computation_point.description: When in the page lifecycle the computation executes

computation.description: Expression, query, or value used to compute the item value

Validation.description: A server-side validation that checks data integrity on page submission

enum: Item is NOT NULL or zero

associated_item.description: Page item associated with the validation for error display

error_message.description: Error message displayed when validation fails

when_button_pressed.description: Name of the button that triggers this validation

expression.description: Validation expression, query, or regular expression

DynamicAction.description: A client-side dynamic action that responds to browser events to modify page content without a full page refresh

event.description: Browser event that triggers the dynamic action

triggering_element_type.description: Type of element that fires the event

condition_type.description: Client-side condition evaluated before executing actions

true_actions.description: Actions executed when the condition is true

false_actions.description: Actions executed when the condition is false

DynamicActionAction.description: A single action within a dynamic action's true or false execution path

affected_element_type.description: Type of element affected by the action

affected_element.description: Identifier of the element affected by the action

fire_on_initialization.description: Whether the action fires when the page first loads

Branch.description: A branching rule that controls navigation after page processing

target_page_id.description: Target page ID for page branches

when_button_pressed.description: Name of the button that triggers this branch

SharedComponents.description: Application-level shared components reusable across pages

navigation_lists.description: Navigation list definitions for menus and navigation bars

application_items.description: Application-level items accessible across all pages

application_processes.description: Application-level processes that execute on every page

application_computations.description: Application-level computations that execute on every page

authorization_schemes.description: Authorization scheme definitions for access control

build_options.description: Build options for conditional inclusion/exclusion of components

ListOfValues.description: A shared list of values providing display/return value pairs for select lists, popup LOVs, and other item types

name.description: Name of the list of values

lov_type.description: Source type for the list of values

source.description: SQL query or static definition providing the values

NavigationList.description: A navigation list defining menu entries and their hierarchy

Breadcrumb.description: A breadcrumb definition for hierarchical navigation

ApplicationItem.description: An application-level session state item accessible from any page

ApplicationProcess.description: An application-level process that executes on every page request

process_point.description: Execution point in the page lifecycle

ApplicationComputation.description: An application-level computation that sets an application item value

item_name.description: Name of the application item to set

AuthorizationScheme.description: An authorization scheme that controls access to application components based on user attributes or roles

expression.description: Authorization expression, query, or role name

error_message.description: Error message displayed when authorization fails

evaluate_once.description: Whether to cache the result for the session instead of re-evaluating on each access

BuildOption.description: A build option that controls conditional inclusion or exclusion of application components during deployment

status.description: Current status of the build option

description.description: Description of what the build option controls

EmailTemplate.description: An email template for sending formatted notifications from the application

static_id.description: Static identifier used to reference the template in PL/SQL

subject.description: Email subject line, may include substitution strings

html_body.description: HTML body of the email template

text_body.description: Plain text body of the email template

RestDataSource.description: A REST data source definition for consuming external REST APIs from within APEX components

name.description: Name of the REST data source

url_endpoint.description: Base URL of the REST endpoint

pagination_type.description: Type of pagination used by the external API

credential_name.description: Name of the web credential used for authentication

static_id.description: Static identifier for referencing the data source

WebCredential.description: A web credential store used to authenticate outbound REST requests

authentication_type.description: Type of authentication the credential provides

valid_for_urls.description: URL pattern the credential is valid for
